title: User request is ambiguous between PR and PO — bot asks before acting

conversation.user: I need to place an order for SUP-100.

bot_must: recognise ambiguity: 'order' could mean Purchase Order (PO module, immediate procurement) or Purchase Request (PR module, request to buy)
ask clarifying question: 'Do you want to place a Purchase Order (commit to buy now) or raise a Purchase Request (request approval to buy)?'
bot_must_not: pick one and start collecting slots

conversation.user: Just a PO, I have authority to commit.

bot_must: ask which kind of PO (since 5 create variants exist)
start collecting Direct PO header slots

evaluation_metrics.two_stage_disambiguation: module first (PO vs PR), then variant within PO
